docket_entries.description: *** FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF PETITION BY KARLA TEOFANIA CALDERON ON 2/28/24 IS STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES FILED 3/13/24. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
